headline: Is Applovin Corp (APP) Stock a Buy Ahead of the Q2 Report?
summary: Applovin Corp (NASDAQ:APP) is one of the best stocks to buy for the AI boom in the second half of 2026. Applovin shares have returned more than 50% over the past year and still carry nearly 30% upside potential, according to Street analysts. Some 91 hedge funds have confidence in the Applovin stock outlook. Applovin […]

headline: Here's What to Expect From AppLovin’s Next Earnings Report
summary: AppLovin is set to report Q2 earnings next month, and analysts project its bottom line will improve by double digits.
